credentials.title: I LOCK IT account
credentials.description: Sign in with your I LOCK IT (haveltec) account. The lock's Bluetooth credentials and cloud location device are fetched from the backend.

select.title: Select lock
select.description: Choose which lock on your account to add.

error.cannot_connect: Login failed. Check the email and password.
error.no_locks: No locks were found on this account.
error.not_in_range: This lock is not currently in range of a Bluetooth proxy/adapter. Bring it close to one and try again.

abort.no_matching_lock: The discovered lock is not on the signed-in account.
abort.all_configured: All locks on this account are already configured.

enter_pairing_mode.name: Enter pairing mode
enter_pairing_mode.description: Put the lock into pairing/coupling mode so the app can re-pair it. The lock drops the connection (expected).

reset.name: Factory reset
reset.description: DESTRUCTIVE. Factory-resets the lock, clearing its settings.

unpair.name: Unpair this client
unpair.description: DESTRUCTIVE. Removes this client's authorization; the lock must be paired again.
